subcodes.first_line: O Sun of Truth! Send forth a ray from Thy manifestations unto him that hath turned towards Thee and seeketh to direct himself unto Thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا شمس الحقیقه ارسل تجلیا من تجلیاتک الی من اقبل الیک و اراد ان یتوجه الی
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
